originalAlarm.description: The right operand of '+' is a garbage value

sanitizedDescription: The right operand of '+' is a garbage value
reasoning: 95755181b82.c L33-34: 'Right operand of + is garbage' in `iobuf + len`. PC: !__need___FILE — a stdio.h internal library macro only, no feature config flags. `len` is unconditionally initialized at L25-26 (outside any #ifdef), so it cannot be garbage. Desugaring artifact: the __need___FILE condition is a stdio.h inclusion guard, making this a spurious path in the desugared analysis.
